HERO.NAME: Ayoub RAFFASS
HERO.TITLE: Senior Software Engineer
HERO.SUBTITLE: Building scalable microservices, AI-powered platforms, and elegant frontends. Currently working on LLMs & API Management at Gravitee.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.BIO_1: I'm a passionate Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building robust backend systems and modern frontends. I specialize in Java/Spring Boot microservices, Angular applications, and cloud-native architectures.
ABOUT.BIO_2: Currently at Gravitee, I work on cutting-edge AI integration — building LLM proxies, MCP servers, and API management solutions that help teams govern and scale their AI usage.

ROLES.TITLE: Senior Software Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Working on the AI/Federation team building LLM proxies, MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, and API Management (APIM) solutions. Designing scalable architectures for AI governance and API federation.

ROLES.TITLE: Senior FullStack Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Led the refactor of a B2B platform across the full order lifecycle (Catalogue → Devis → Commandes). Worked in Agile/SAFe teams, implemented Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, and improved platform performance and maintainability.

ROLES.TITLE: Software Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Developed and maintained enterprise software solutions, contributing to backend services and API development.

ROLES.TITLE: Full Stack Java EE / Angular Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Built and maintained banking applications for Bank Of Africa. Developed full-stack features using Java EE and Angular, ensuring high reliability and security for financial transactions.

ROLES.TITLE: Full Stack Java EE / Angular Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Developed enterprise-grade full-stack applications for Orange Business Services, working on large-scale infrastructure and B2B service platforms.

ROLES.TITLE: Java Engineer
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Worked as a Java engineer at Scor (external mission), building the ForeWriter platform — a document generation and workflow automation tool for the insurance industry.

ITEMS.DESCRIPTION: Ingénieur d'état in Computer Science and Information Systems.
University Diploma of Technology in Computer Science.
